## Description

<!-- What changed and why. Link to relevant context if applicable. -->

## Related Issues

<!-- Reference related issues: "Closes #123", "Fixes #456", or "Related to #789". -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature or improvement
- [ ] `fix` / `hotfix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructuring (no behavior change)
- [ ] `perf` — Performance optimization
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation
- [ ] `style` — Code formatting (no logic change)
- [ ] `build` / `ci` — Build system or CI/CD
- [ ] `chore` / `config` / `prune` — Maintenance or cleanup
- [ ] `security` — Security fix or enhancement
- [ ] `BREAKING-CHANGE` — Backward-incompatible change

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format (e.g., `feat: add sparkle particle shape`)
- [ ] PR targets the correct branch (`development` for Svelte 5, `v1/development` for Svelte 3/4)
- [ ] `pnpm clean-code` passes (ESLint, Stylelint, Prettier)
- [ ] `pnpm check` passes (svelte-check)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] Breaking changes are documented (if applicable)
